Parameters.Name: BaseUrl
Parameters.Label: Base Url
Parameters.HelpText: e.g. http://mywebsite.com.au/ - This should be where you'd normally manually sync Unicorn

Parameters.Name: Timeout
Parameters.Label: Timeout
Parameters.HelpText: The timeout for the Web-Invoke method

Parameters.Name: DeploymentAuthToken
Parameters.Label: Deployment Auth Token
Parameters.HelpText:
The auth token used to authenticate this request.
This should be in your web.config appSettings as DeploymentToolAuthToken.

Parameters.Name: BasicAuthUsername
Parameters.Label: Basic Auth Username
Parameters.HelpText: Fill this in if the target site is behind basic auth

Parameters.Name: BasicAuthPassword
Parameters.Label: Basic Auth Password
Parameters.HelpText: Fill this in if the target site is behind basic auth
